div.h1: API Safety Design: Iterator Invalidation Control
div.p: Target: Memory-Safe Entity Component System Implementation

ul.li: Borrow Restriction: WorldRef encapsulates the World but only exposes immutable access.
Deferred Mutation: All structural changes are pushed to CommandBuffer.
Lifetime Alignment: 'a ensures that proxies cannot outlive the World instance.

div.p: Rationale: Provides the best balance between implementation velocity and safety. Prevents memory corruption during high-concurrency dispatch while keeping the user-facing API clean.

ol.li: Allocate AtomicBool at offset 0x50 in World.
Instrument World::get_mut and World::entities_mut with state checks.
Ensure Schedule toggles guard state before/after system iteration.

g.title: Enforces single-mutable-command-buffer borrow at compile time using Rust lifetimes.
